Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 93 upvotes, 9 comments
  2. Do your own writing 19 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. The ladder is missing rungs – Engineering Progression When AI Ate the Middle 24 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. You are falling behind because you haven't fed the insincerity machine 81 upvotes, 12 comments
  5. 15 Years of Forking 284 upvotes, 59 comments
  6. The curious case of retro demo scene graphics 316 upvotes, 79 comments
  7. An NSFW filter for Marginalia search 37 upvotes, 5 comments
  8. Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Equation: Reinforcement Learning and Diffusion Models 132 upvotes, 39 comments
  9. Copilot edited an ad into my PR 1324 upvotes, 539 comments
  10. How to turn anything into a router 412 upvotes, 157 comments
  11. VHDL's Crown Jewel 135 upvotes, 47 comments
  12. New Washington state law bans noncompete agreements 175 upvotes, 64 comments
  13. Comprehensive C++ Hashmap Benchmarks (2022) 53 upvotes, 15 comments
  14. Mathematical methods and human thought in the age of AI 160 upvotes, 61 comments
  15. Build123d: A Python CAD programming library 71 upvotes, 23 comments
  16. I use Excalidraw to manage my diagrams for my blog 228 upvotes, 98 comments
  17. A sea of sparks: Seeing radioactivity 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. FTC action against Match and OkCupid for deceiving users, sharing personal data 151 upvotes, 66 comments
  19. Proactively Parasocial 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  20. ChatGPT won't let you type until Cloudflare reads your React state 918 upvotes, 593 comments
  21. Take better notes, by hand 92 upvotes, 47 comments
  22. Show HN: Coasts – Containerized Hosts for Agents 22 upvotes, 7 comments
  23. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 165 upvotes, 95 comments
  24. Ninja is a small build system with a focus on speed 88 upvotes, 47 comments
  25. Fedware: Government Apps That Spy Harder Than the Apps They Ban 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  26. Bird brains (2023) 238 upvotes, 150 comments
  27. DigitalOcean Seeks $800M in Funding 35 upvotes, 15 comments
  28. I am definitely missing the pre-AI writing era 162 upvotes, 139 comments
  29. OCR for construction documents does not work, we fixed it 53 upvotes, 38 comments
  30. Fibonacci's Composed Fractions 4 upvotes, 1 comments

Last generated 3:00am, 31 March 2026. Source here.
